name: HTS_SCHEDULES_SHIFT_TYPES_VL
query: SELECT SchedulesShiftTypesEO.SHIFT_ID, SchedulesShiftTypesEO.SHIFT_NAME, SchedulesShiftTypesEO.SHIFT_DESC, SchedulesShiftTypesEO.START_TIME_MS_NUM, SchedulesShiftTypesEO.END_TIME_MS_NUM, SchedulesShiftTypesEO.DURATION_MS_NUM, SchedulesShiftTypesEO.DURATION_UOM_CODE, SchedulesShiftTypesEO.SHIFT_TYPE_CODE, SchedulesShiftTypesEO.SHORT_TXT, SchedulesShiftTypesEO.CATEGORY_CODE, SchedulesShiftTypesEO.GLOBAL_FLAG, SchedulesShiftTypesEO.AVAILABILITY_CODE, SchedulesShiftTypesEO.SHIFT_DTL_TYPE_CODE, SchedulesShiftTypesEO.DELETED_FLAG, SchedulesShiftTypesEO.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, SchedulesShiftTypesEO.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, SchedulesShiftTypesDetailsEO.SHIFT_COLOUR, SchedulesShiftTypesDetailsEO.SHIFT_SHORT_NAME, SchedulesShiftTypesDetailsEO.START_EARLY_GRACE, SchedulesShiftTypesDetailsEO.START_LATE_GRACE, SchedulesShiftTypesDetailsEO.END_EARLY_GRACE, SchedulesShiftTypesDetailsEO.END_LATE_GRACE, SchedulesShiftTypesDetailsEO.START_EARLY_VIOLATION, SchedulesShiftTypesDetailsEO.START_LATE_VIOLATION, SchedulesShiftTypesDetailsEO.END_LATE_VIOLATION, SchedulesShiftTypesDetailsEO.END_EARLY_VIOLATION, SchedulesShiftTypesDetailsEO.TOLERANCE, SchedulesShiftTypesDetailsEO.SHIFT_TYPE_ID, 'N' CUSTOM_SHIFT, SchedulesShiftTypesDetailsEO.TIME_NOT_WORKED, null DAY_INDICATOR, SchedulesShiftTypesDetailsEO.SHIFT_CODE, null MODULE_ID, SchedulesShiftTypesDetailsEO.LAST_UPDATE_DATE FROM ZMM_SR_SHIFTS_VL SchedulesShiftTypesEO, HTS_SHIFT_TYPES_DETAILS SchedulesShiftTypesDetailsEO WHERE SchedulesShiftTypesEO.SHIFT_ID = SchedulesShiftTypesDetailsEO.SHIFT_TYPE_ID(+) AND SchedulesShiftTypesEO.SHIFT_TYPE_CODE != 'DURATION' UNION SELECT SchedulesCustomShiftTypesEO.SHIFT_TYPE_ID SHIFT_ID, SchedulesCustomShiftTypesEO.SHIFT_NAME, SchedulesCustomShiftTypesEO.SHIFT_DESC, SchedulesCustomShiftTypesEO.START_TIME_MS_NUM, SchedulesCustomShiftTypesEO.END_TIME_MS_NUM, SchedulesCustomShiftTypesEO.DURATION_MS_NUM, SchedulesCustomShiftTypesEO.DURATION_UOM_CODE, SchedulesCustomShiftTypesEO.SHIFT_TYPE_CODE, SchedulesCustomShiftTypesEO.SHORT_TXT, SchedulesCustomShiftTypesEO.CATEGORY_CODE, SchedulesCustomShiftTypesEO.GLOBAL_FLAG, SchedulesCustomShiftTypesEO.AVAILABILITY_CODE, SchedulesCustomShiftTypesEO.SHIFT_DTL_TYPE_CODE, SchedulesCustomShiftTypesEO.DELETED_FLAG, SchedulesCustomShiftTypesEO.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, SchedulesCustomShiftTypesEO.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, SchedulesCustomShiftTypesEO.SHIFT_COLOUR, SchedulesCustomShiftTypesEO.SHIFT_SHORT_NAME, SchedulesCustomShiftTypesEO.START_EARLY_GRACE, SchedulesCustomShiftTypesEO.START_LATE_GRACE, SchedulesCustomShiftTypesEO.END_EARLY_GRACE, SchedulesCustomShiftTypesEO.END_LATE_GRACE, SchedulesCustomShiftTypesEO.START_EARLY_VIOLATION, SchedulesCustomShiftTypesEO.START_LATE_VIOLATION, SchedulesCustomShiftTypesEO.END_LATE_VIOLATION, SchedulesCustomShiftTypesEO.END_EARLY_VIOLATION, SchedulesCustomShiftTypesEO.TOLERANCE, SchedulesCustomShiftTypesEO.SHIFT_TYPE_ID, 'Y' CUSTOM_SHIFT, SchedulesCustomShiftTypesEO.TIME_NOT_WORKED, SchedulesCustomShiftTypesEO.DAY_INDICATOR, SchedulesCustomShiftTypesEO.SHIFT_CODE, SchedulesCustomShiftTypesEO.MODULE_ID, SchedulesCustomShiftTypesEO.LAST_UPDATE_DATE from HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_VL SchedulesCustomShiftTypesEO WHERE NVL(SchedulesCustomShiftTypesEO.DELETED_FLAG, 'N') <> 'Y'
